info.name: Accountanta Finance Tracker API
info.description:
Complete API collection for Accountanta — personal finance management platform.

Includes: Authentication (email + Google OAuth), Accounts, Categories, Transactions, Budgets, Debts, Saving Goals, Dashboard, Insights, Support, Data Management, and Admin endpoints.

JWT-based auth — after login/signup, the token is automatically stored in the `token` collection variable.

item.name: Authentication
item.description: Sign up, log in (email + Google OAuth), logout, password reset with OTP

request.description: Create a new user account. Returns JWT token and user data.
Sign in with email and password. Returns JWT token.
Authenticate via Google OAuth. Pass Google user info from the mobile client.
Sign out. Client should discard JWT token.
Request a password reset OTP. Always returns success to prevent email enumeration.
Verify the 6-digit OTP. Returns a temporary reset_token (15 min expiry).
Reset password using the token from verify_otp.

item.name: Profile
item.description: Manage user profile, photo, and account deletion

request.description: Permanently delete user account and all associated data.

item.name: Accounts
item.description: Manage bank accounts, wallets, and other financial accounts

item.name: Transactions
item.description: Record and manage income, expenses, and transfers

item.name: Budgets
item.description: Set and track spending budgets per category

item.name: Debts
item.description: Track loans, debts, and repayment schedules

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Car Loan",
  "amount": 15000.00,
  "creditor": "ABC Bank",
  "description": "Monthly car loan payment",
  "due_date": "2026-12-31",
  "status": "pending",
  "debt_type": "loan",
  "interest_rate": 5.5,
  "is_recurring": true
}

item.name: Saving Goals
item.description: Set savings targets and track progress

item.name: Dashboard
item.description: High-level financial overview and quick stats

item.name: Insights
item.description: Spending trends, comparisons, and analytical breakdowns

body.raw:
{
  "email": "user@example.com",
  "display_name": "John Doe",
  "message_type": "bug_report",
  "message": "I found a bug when adding a transaction.",
  "app_version": "1.2.0",
  "build_number": "42",
  "platform": "ios"
}

request.description: Deletes transactions, budgets, debts, saving goals, support messages. Resets balances. Keeps accounts & categories.
Permanently deletes ALL user data including accounts and categories.

item.name: Admin — Authentication
item.description: Admin login, logout, password reset (JSON API)

item.name: Admin — User Management
item.description: List, view, activate, deactivate, grant/revoke admin

request.description: Replace 1 with the invitation ID to revoke.

item.name: Admin — Analytics
item.description: Platform analytics: user growth, transactions, financial insights, revenue

item.name: Admin — Reports
item.description: Generate daily, weekly, monthly, and custom reports
